summary: DHH announces he is selling off gadgets and electronics he no longer uses. The post is a brief personal notice directing Danish readers to a sale page. It lists items including a Sony Vaio laptop, Sega Dreamcast, and Game Boy Advance among others.
key_points: DHH is decluttering unused electronics and gadgets
The sale is limited to Denmark with no international shipping
Items span computing, gaming, and audio equipment
money_quotes: I have way too many gadgets and pieces of electronics that I'm not using.
key_insight: A brief personal housekeeping post with no substantive argument or insight — DHH is simply selling old gadgets.
